name: Fire Bolt
description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.

name: Ray of Frost
description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature within range. On a hit, it takes cold damage.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take radiant damage.

name: Magic Missile
description: You create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range. The darts all strike simultaneously.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC.

name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube must make a Constitution saving throw.

name: Cure Wounds
description: A creature you touch regains hit points. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

name: Healing Word
description: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains hit points.

name: Guiding Bolt
description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature of your choice within range. The next attack roll made against this target has advantage.

name: Bless
description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw, it can add a d4 to the result.
